Headline: #152 Addison Temporary Reroute at Addison/Pulaski
ShortDescription: #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, police activity near Addison/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Addison, Pulaski, Irving Park, Laramie, Addison then over their normal route due to police activity near Addison/Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.
